Controls and Gameplay Mechanics

Controlling the puffy cat unblock game is a breeze, with intuitive keyboard and mouse controls available on desktop devices. But be warned: the puffy cat unblock game can be quite addictive, so be prepared to spend a few hours exploring its vast, maze-like world.
